description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Chocolate brown textured bag with a removable short handle and a shoulder strap Has a purse style clasp with a fabric inner Has a zipped pocket and a mobile slot inside Material and Care Polyurethane Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 30 cm  Width: 36 cm  Depth: 8 cm
